ddls:
CREATE TABLE "cookies" (
  "cookie_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each cookie */,
  "name" TEXT /* Name of the cookie */,
  "hosts" TEXT /* Hosts or domains that set the cookie */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the cookie */,
  "expiration" TEXT /* Expiration date or duration of the cookie */,
  "type" TEXT /* Type of cookie (e.g., HTTP, None) */,
  "cookie_category" TEXT /* Category of the cookie (e.g., necessary, performance, targeting) */,
  "cookie_purpose" TEXT /* Purpose of the cookie */,
  "privacy_impact" TEXT /* Potential impact on user privacy */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("cookie_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_cookies_hosts FOREIGN KEY ("hosts") REFERENCES hosts ("host_name"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_cookies_type FOREIGN KEY ("type") REFERENCES cookie_types ("type_name")
)

CREATE TABLE "hosts" (
  "host_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each host */,
  "host_name" TEXT /* Name of the host or domain */,
  "host_type" TEXT /* Type of host (e.g., website, social media, advertising) */,
  "host_description" TEXT /* Description of the host */,
  "host_category" TEXT /* Category of the host (e.g., first-party, third-party) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("host_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "cookie_types" (
  "type_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each cookie type */,
  "type_name" TEXT /* Name of the cookie type */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the cookie type */,
  "type_category" TEXT /* Category of the cookie type (e.g., functional, tracking) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("type_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "user_name" TEXT /* Full name of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., admin, user) */,
  "consent_status" TEXT /* Consent status of the user (e.g., opted-in, opted-out) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "consent" (
  "consent_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each consent record */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user who gave consent */,
  "cookie_id" INTEGER /* ID of the cookie for which consent was given */,
  "consent_date" TEXT /* Date when consent was given */,
  "consent_type" TEXT /* Type of consent (e.g., opt-in, opt-out) */,
  "consent_status" TEXT /* Status of consent (e.g., active, revoked) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("consent_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_consent_cookie_id FOREIGN KEY ("cookie_id") REFERENCES cookies ("cookie_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_consent_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "cookie_user" (
  "id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each association */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user */,
  "cookie_id" INTEGER /* ID of the cookie */,
  "cookie_date" TEXT /* Date when the cookie was set */,
  "cookie_status" TEXT /* Status of the cookie (e.g., active, expired) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_cookie_user_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_cookie_user_cookie_id FOREIGN KEY ("cookie_id") REFERENCES cookies ("cookie_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "websites" (
  "website_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each website */,
  "website_name" TEXT /* Name of the website */,
  "website_url" TEXT /* URL of the website */,
  "website_category" TEXT /* Category of the website (e.g., e-commerce, blog) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("website_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "analytics" (
  "analytics_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each analytics record */,
  "website_id" INTEGER /* ID of the website */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user */,
  "visit_date" TEXT /* Date of the visit */,
  "visit_count" INTEGER /* Number of visits */,
  "page_views" INTEGER /* Number of page views */,
  "bounce_rate" REAL /* Bounce rate of the visit */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("analytics_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_analytics_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_analytics_website_id FOREIGN KEY ("website_id") REFERENCES websites ("website_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "gdpr_compliance" (
  "gdpr_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each GDPR record */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user */,
  "cookie_id" INTEGER /* ID of the cookie */,
  "consent_date" TEXT /* Date when GDPR compliance was checked */,
  "gdpr_status" TEXT /* Status of GDPR compliance (e.g., compliant, non-compliant) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("gdpr_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_gdpr_compliance_cookie_id FOREIGN KEY ("cookie_id") REFERENCES cookies ("cookie_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_gdpr_compliance_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)
